text:
Created attachment 221878
py-sarge.diff

Changelog:

- Added an optional timeout to Command.wait and Pipeline.wait, which only takes effect on Python >= 3.3.
- Added the replace_env keyword argument which allows a complete replacement for os.environ to be passed.
- Improved error handling around a Popen call.

https://bitbucket.org/vinay.sajip/sarge/src/master/docs/overview.rst

portlint -C still looks fine. Make commands still work fine.
